title: Principal Frontend Developer at NIIT Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Principal Frontend Developer at NIIT Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
NIIT Asia Pacific Associates, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Frontend Developer for our Jaipur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About NIIT Asia Pacific Associates:
NIIT Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NIIT Asia Pacific Associates!
